services.name: Independence Day Sale — 20% Off
services.description: Celebrate the 4th of July with 20% off our regular service menu. A limited-time thank-you to our wonderful clients. Excludes nail services and other spa specials.
services.fullDescription: Happy Independence Day from Laura's Beauty Touch! For a limited time, enjoy 20% off our regular service menu as part of our July 4th celebration. Please note this offer excludes nail services and our other spa specials, and can't be combined with other discounts or packages. Whether you're treating yourself before the holiday weekend or gifting a little glow to someone you love, there's no better time to relax, refresh, and feel your best. Mention the July 4th special when you book.
benefits: Perfect time to try something new
Mention the July 4th special when booking

services.name: Full Leg & Brazilian Wax + Spa Pedicure & Manicure
services.description: Smooth, polished, and pampered head to toe. Full leg and Brazilian wax paired with a relaxing spa pedicure and manicure.
services.fullDescription: Get holiday-ready from head to toe with our July 4th combo. Enjoy a full leg wax and Brazilian wax for silky-smooth skin, then unwind with a soothing spa pedicure and manicure to leave your hands and feet perfectly polished. The ultimate refresh before the long weekend — all at one special price.

services.name: Champagne Body Scrub with Shower
services.description: An effervescent, exfoliating body scrub that leaves skin glowing and silky-soft, finished with a refreshing shower.
services.fullDescription: Treat your skin to a luxurious Champagne Body Scrub that gently exfoliates and renews, revealing soft, radiant skin from shoulders to toes. Finish with a refreshing shower to rinse away the day and step out feeling completely revitalized. A sparkling little escape, just in time for the 4th of July.
